title: Appraise wool using industry descriptions
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Appraise wool using industry descriptions demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Apply the industry description to lines in a clip

pcs.text: Access the system for the appraisal of non-measured characteristics of wool
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access the system for the appraisal of non-measured characteristics of wool?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access the system for the appraisal of non-measured characteristics of wool.

pcs.text: Identify and classify the visual characteristics to be appraised using the relevant descriptors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and classify the visual characteristics to be appraised using the relevant descriptors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and classify the visual characteristics to be appraised using the relevant descriptors.

pcs.text: Check wool clip classing lines for compliance with the industry code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check wool clip classing lines for compliance with the industry code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check wool clip classing lines for compliance with the industry code of practice.

pcs.text: Appraise wool clip classing lines and record the non-measured characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Appraise wool clip classing lines and record the non-measured characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Appraise wool clip classing lines and record the non-measured characteristics.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Apply the industry description to lines in a clip

elements.title: Use the industry description to establish a market value for lines made

pcs.text: Access market information from reliable sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access market information from reliable sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access market information from reliable sources.

pcs.text: Identify premiums and discounts for wool characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify premiums and discounts for wool characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify premiums and discounts for wool characteristics.

pcs.text: Use information accessed to determine a value for each line made
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use information accessed to determine a value for each line made?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use information accessed to determine a value for each line made.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Use the industry description to establish a market value for lines made

elements.title: Review clip preparation strategies using an industry description

pcs.text: Check clip preparation strategies and revise using the appraisal of non-measured characteristics and the market value applied to the lines made
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check clip preparation strategies and revise using the appraisal of non-measured characteristics and the market value applied to the lines made?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check clip preparation strategies and revise using the appraisal of non-measured characteristics and the market value applied to the lines made.

pcs.text: Assess market information, the effect of management on the wool clip and possible future classing strategies using the appraisal of non-measured characteristics applied to the lines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess market information, the effect of management on the wool clip and possible future classing strategies using the appraisal of non-measured characteristics applied to the lines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess market information, the effect of management on the wool clip and possible future classing strategies using the appraisal of non-measured characteristics applied to the lines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Review clip preparation strategies using an industry description

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
